query:
SELECT 
  underlying_symbol,
  action,
  transaction_sub_type,
  symbol,
  strike_price,
  expires_at,
  net_value,
  description
FROM cached_transactions
WHERE transaction_type = 'Trade'
  AND (underlying_symbol LIKE '%SPX%' OR underlying_symbol LIKE '%NDX%')
ORDER BY underlying_symbol, executed_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
